description: This file contains SCSS code defining grid layout styles, including CSS variables, mixins, and conditional class styles for grid rows and columns.
external_files: variables or mixins files that define $grid-breakpoints, $prefix, $enable-grid-classes, $enable-cssgrid, $grid-columns, $grid-gutter-width, and mixins like make-row(), make-col-ready(), make-cssgrid(), make-grid-columns()
